name: Alarm snags
notes:
The are always between 5am and 6.30am - even when there is no wind. Right now, the alarm system is not useful and we also had PPA coming by while we did not hear the alarm.
The plant room camera doesn't stream either.

name: Savant cameras down
notes: See if Marlon is there and can reboot the NVR. Try troubleshoot remotely before going out Monday.

name: Ubiquity POE
notes:
Hay guys

This unit was brought back from Fulham, it didn't power up the PTZ. Are we crediting the client?

name: Query tg white invoice with base. Insurance did not pay out
Broadcast Holiday Message, and confirm the contact people for these projects
notes:
Good day

Thank you for being a part of D-One's 2023, please note that D-One will be closed from the 14th Dec to 15th Jan 2024 as our projects close for Builders break. 
For any urgent service requirements during the holiday period, please contact our service department on WhatsApp at +27210125112, or email service@d-one.co.za. 

 Enjoy the festive holidays and be safe! 

Regards

D-One Team

asana list link will give details of time and what was purchased:

Hi Stafford, when at Fulham, please also check zone 23.
Sensitivity, direction, etc.
It seems to trigger at the slightest breeze.
Doesn't seem to be Hadedas.

name: Confirm that all change orders in Excel are in Jetbuilt
Which Lutron processor is installed at Fulham? 6 or 7?
Lighting
notes:
Darren. Feedback from the last 3 days
1) the vacation mode does not work. It turns itself on again. Annoying when you went to bed earlier. Only work around was to switch off each of the timers separately which is annoying as well
2) the garage light switches itself automatically off after some time even if one actively switches the light on. This is a problem as I work in the garage and need to turn it on every couple of minutes
3) problem that probably stems from the master wardrobe sensors rather than savant but maybe you would have the possibility to switch is actively off at night. It keeps turning it on in the middle of the night 
Thanks

name: Make sure Mareike is setup as a master that can add users to Olarm
Updates
notes:
The blinds were done by others and aren't able to be added to scenes. There might be a way for us to code a schedule into the software if it's something that you want done daily. 
You can mail me a schedule. And we can see if we can write something to execute it.

notes: Only the under-vanity light should be turned on and off with the motion sensor. Currently when the motion sensor times out, the whole room turns off. The other lights should be controlled by the buttons, and only the under-vanity turns on and off with the motion sensor.

Olarm additional zones

name: Fine-tune security lights activation
notes: Security lights are triggering on while they are in the garden, as well as just generally. We need to refine it, so it ONLY comes on if a human approaches the boundary on the sea side, plot side. And not movement etc
